name: Immunization Contraindication Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for conditions that represent contraindications to vaccination, including anaphylaxis to vaccine components, encephalopathy following vaccination, severe combined immunodeficiency, and other immune conditions. Used as exclusion criteria in childhood immunization (CIS) and adolescent immunization (IMA) measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Anaphylactic reaction due to unspecified food, initial encounter
Anaphylactic reaction due to shellfish, initial encounter
Anaphylactic reaction due to other food, initial encounter
Anaphylactic reaction due to vaccination, initial encounter
Anaphylactic reaction due to other serum, initial encounter
Other serum reaction due to vaccination, initial encounter
Severe combined immunodeficiency (SCID) with reticular dysgenesis
Severe combined immunodeficiency with low T- and B-cell numbers
Severe combined immunodeficiency with low or normal B-cell numbers
Allergy status to other antibiotic agents
Allergy status to other drugs, medicaments and biological substances
